overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dense futuristic cityscape during golden hour. The camera maintains an elevated stationary view above a neon-lit urban canyon as flying vehicles traverse between high-rise buildings and industrial structures.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide elevated view of a cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour. The camera slowly pans right, revealing neon signage and industrial architecture. Two flying vehicles traverse the scene from right to left, passing between the dense urban structures and elevated transit bridges.

events.description: third flying vehicle enters from right side of frame
fourth flying vehicle enters from right and moves toward center

agents.ego_description: continued stationary observation with slow rightward pan, tracking flying traffic

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving leftward through the urban canyon
flying vehicle traversing from right to left across the frame

entered.detail: floating digital advertisement visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow rightward pan, bringing the neon 'softsys' signage and red metal facade into closer view. Two additional flying vehicles traverse the scene, moving between the towering structures. The industrial smokestacks shift toward the left mid-ground as the perspective changes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, elevated pan across a dense cyberpunk cityscape that shifts from a wide urban vista to a focused view of industrial neon architecture. It begins with a broad perspective of the city during golden hour, where flying vehicles glide between towering structures and elevated transit bridges. As the camera continues its steady rightward movement, the distant skyline gives way to more intimate details of the urban canyon, bringing a red metal facade and glowing softsys signage into closer view. The scene then shifts its perspective, causing the industrial smokestacks to drift toward the left mid-ground while additional flying vehicles traverse the gap between the high-rises.
